message:
fix: resolve critical bugs and compilation errors

- bundler/blob.rs: use nested directory structure for blobs to avoid colon in filenames (portability)
- core/recovery.rs: replace unsafe libc::kill with safe Command-based process check
- storage/sqlite.rs: remove duplicate struct definitions
- sync/engine.rs: fix type mismatch (borrowing) and missing path initialization
- cli/commands/graph.rs: fix private module usage and borrow after move
- core/skill.rs: ensure SkillMetadata fields have default values for deserialization
- core/spec_lens.rs: update test expectations
- graph/skills.rs: fix private module usage
- suggestions/bandit/types.rs: update for rand 0.9 breaking changes
- Cargo.toml: downgrade reqwest to 0.12 for feature compatibility, enable insta features
